languages.text: {n}Себериан тяжело вздыхает и оборачивается к вам.{/n} "Надо отдать вам должное, наследн{mf|ик|ица}... пускай мы не всегда смотрели на одни и те же ситуации и проблемы одинаково, пускай я вижу в ваших деяниях ошибки и просчеты... но вы — достойн{mf|ый|ая} предержатель{mf||ница} Патента и продолжатель{mf||ница} дела фон Валанциусов. Благодарю — теперь моя душа может быть спокойна, зная, что наша династия в надежных руках".

{n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан тяжело вздыхает и оборачивается к вам.{/n} "Надо отдать вам должное, наследн{mf|ик|ица}... пускай мы не всегда смотрели на одни и те же ситуации и проблемы одинаково, пускай я вижу в ваших деяниях ошибки и просчеты... но вы — достойн{mf|ый|ая} предержатель{mf||ница} Патента и продолжатель{mf||ница} дела фон Валанциусов. Благодарю — теперь моя душа может быть спокойна, зная, что наша династия в надежных руках".

For this I thank you; now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."

languages.text: {n}Seberian seufzt tief und wendet sich zu dir.{/n} "Ehre, wem Ehre gebührt, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin} ... Obwohl wir hinsichtlich einiger Probleme und Situationen anderer Meinung waren und ich Fehler und Fehleinschätzungen in Eurem Handeln erkannt habe ... seid Ihr trotzdem {mf|ein würdiger Träger|eine würdige Trägerin} des Handelsbriefs und bereit, die Dynastie derer von Valancius in die Zukunft zu führen. Dafür danke ich Euch. Nun kann ich im Wissen, dass die Dynastie in sicheren Händen ist, Frieden finden."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."

Dafür danke ich Euch. Nun kann ich im Wissen, dass die Dynastie in sicheren Händen ist, Frieden finden.

languages.text: {n}Seberian pousse un profond soupir et se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Force m'est de le reconnaître, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}... Si nous n'avons pas toujours été d'accord face à certaines situations et difficultés, et si j'ai pu remarquer quelques méprises et erreurs de jugement dans vos actions... Vous n'en restez pas moins {mf|le digne détenteur|la digne détentrice} de la lettre de marque, et largement à la hauteur des attentes de la dynastie von Valancius. Et pour cela, je vous remercie. Je suis rassuré de savoir que notre héritage est entre de bonnes mains. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."

Si nous n'avons pas toujours été d'accord face à certaines situations et difficultés, et si j'ai pu remarquer quelques méprises et erreurs de jugement dans vos actions... Vous n'en restez pas moins {mf|le digne détenteur|la digne détentrice} de la lettre de marque, et largement à la hauteur des attentes de la dynastie von Valancius. Et pour cela, je vous remercie. Je suis rassuré de savoir que notre héritage est entre de bonnes mains. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian suspira con pesadez y se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Debo reconocer tus créditos, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}... Aunque ha habido situaciones y problemas en los que ha quedado patente la diferencia entre nuestras perspectivas, y he visto fallos y errores de juicio en sus actos... es un{mf||a} poseedor{mf||a} dign{mf|o|a} de la Patente y está preparad{mf|o|a} para impulsar el legado de los von Valancius. Le doy las gracias por ello. Puedo respirar tranquilo sabiendo que nuestra dinastía está en buenas manos».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."

Le doy las gracias por ello. Puedo respirar tranquilo sabiendo que nuestra dinastía está en buenas manos».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, derin bir iç çekip sana dönüyor.{/n} "Hakkını vermeliyim vârisim... Farklı gördüğümüz durum ve sorunlar olmuş olsa da, eylemlerindeki hata ve yanlış kararları not etmiş olsam da... Ruhsatname'ye layıksın, von Valancius mirasını ileriye taşımaya uygunsun. Bunun için sana teşekkür ederim. Artık hanedanlığımızın emin ellerde olduğunu bilerek huzur bulabilirim."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."

Farklı gördüğümüz durum ve sorunlar olmuş olsa da, eylemlerindeki hata ve yanlış kararları not etmiş olsam da... Ruhsatname'ye layıksın, von Valancius mirasını ileriye taşımaya uygunsun. Bunun için sana teşekkür ederim. Artık hanedanlığımızın emin ellerde olduğunu bilerek huzur bulabilirim."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安重重叹了口气，朝你转过身。{/n}“我的继承人，该表扬的还是要表扬……虽然我们在一些情况和问题上看法不同，而我也注意到你行动中的失误和误判……但你，仍然配得上贸易授状，担得起冯·瓦兰修斯的传承。为此，我感谢你。现在，知道王朝有可靠的人执掌，我终于可以安心了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安重重叹了口气，朝你转过身。{/n}“我的继承人，该表扬的还是要表扬……虽然我们在一些情况和问题上看法不同，而我也注意到你行动中的失误和误判……但你，仍然配得上贸易授状，担得起冯·瓦兰修斯的传承。为此，我感谢你。现在，知道王朝有可靠的人执掌，我终于可以安心了。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは深くため息をつき、あなたの方を向く。{/n}「君には賞賛の言葉を贈らねばならない。君には、君が王位継承者であることを認める。君と私が異なる見解を持つ状況や問題があったし、君が犯した過ちや判断ミスを私は認識している。しかし、それでも君は王位継承者としてふさわしい。ヴァランシウス家の遺産を継承するのにふさわしい。そのため、感謝する。これで、我々の王朝が安全な手に委ねられていることを知って、私は安らぎを得る。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."
